title: osmanthus marginatus var. longissimus
intro: Osmanthus marginatus var. longissimus, also known as Fragrant Tea Olive, is a variant of the Osmanthus marginatus plant, which is a flowering evergreen shrub native to China and Japan. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Osmanthus marginatus var. longissimus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
